LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MARCH 26, 2012 TO GIVE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT MUST PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM MARCH 14 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARELICH MECHANICAL CO., INC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC INSURANCE COMPANY INCORPORATED'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT - MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS REQUIRED TO ARBITRATE THE DISPUTE. THE WORD "RESOLVED" CONNOTES FINALITY, NOT SOMETHING SHORT OF FINALITY. MOREOVER, THE PARTIES' ACTIONS PRIOR TO THE DISPUTE ARISING ARE MORE SUGGESTIVE THAT THEY BELIEVED THE ARBITRATION TO BE BINDING RATHER THAN "NON-BINDING." THE ACTION IS STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD CSR #7077

Ntc Of Moption To Compel Arb
Off Calendar Mar-26-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. CHARLES L. FANNING IV OF OLIVA & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. (858) 385-0491 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. NATHAN A. CAZIER OF PAYNE & FEARS LLP, TEL. NO. (949) 797-1275 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC INSURANCE COMPANY.

RULING - A R G U E D; DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC INSURANCE COMPANY INCORPORATED'S Motion To Compel Arbitration and dismiss plaintiff's complaint - Motion to compel arbitration is Granted. Plaintiff is required to arbitrate the dispute. The word "resolved" connotes finality, not something short of finality. Moreover, the parties' actions prior to the dispute arising are more suggestive that they believed the arbitration to be binding rather than "non-binding." The action is stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

Ntc Of Moption To Compel Arb
Off Calendar Mar-13-2012 Continued To Mar-26-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Compel Arbitration is continued on the court's own motion to March 26, 2012 to give defendant an opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Defendant must provide courtesy copies of its moving papers to department 302 no later than 4pm March 14 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)
